caption: A screen recording displays a Google Sheets spreadsheet titled "TH 5/13 - 2021 TOPPS TRANSCENDENT COLLECTION HALL OF FAME EDITION BASEBA...". The sheet contains a detailed list of names and items, including "Paul Jon McNelly", "JIM PALMER 14/20", and "(1) GRED MADDUX Hall of Fame Icons autograph Id# 1 of 1". To the right of the spreadsheet, a YouTube video interface is visible, featuring a red "Subscribe" button and text that says "Hit the Subscribe button down below!". A red cursor arrow points toward the subscribe button. Throughout the clip, the screen remains static with no changes in the text, the layout of the spreadsheet, or the position of the cursor, indicating a still shot of a digital workspace. The bottom of the screen shows a website address, "WWW.JAYSEYCABLEBREAKS.COM".
